## 📝 Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes and the related issue.
- Fixes # (issue number)
- Related to: (link to specific package: js-useblysh or py-useblysh)

## 🚀 Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance optimization (IntersectionObserver or DCT math improvements)

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] **JS Test:** `npm run test` passed in `packages/js-useblysh`
- [ ] **Py Test:** `python -m unittest` passed in `packages/py-useblysh`
- [ ] **UI Check:** Verified 60fps scrolling with large image sets.

## 🏁 Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (e.g., DCT math).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [ ] I have bumped the version in `package.json` or `pyproject.toml` (if applicable).
